rules.rule_text:
rule StealC
{
	meta:
		author = "MalBeacon"
		description = "StealC system information file"
		reference = "https://github.com/MalBeacon/what-is-this-stealer"

	strings:
		$x1 = "- HWID:" ascii
		$x2 = "Network Info:" ascii
		$x3 = "- UserName:" ascii
		$x4 = "- Running Path:" ascii
		$x5 = "- Cores:" ascii
		$x6 = "- Display Resolution:" ascii

	condition:
		all of them
}
